title: Nomination of Shri Mukesh Kumar Ja, MD & CEO, OBC on the Board of Canara HSBC OBC Life Insurance Company Ltd. as Director, exempting the applicability
description: Nomination of Shri Mukesh Kumar Ja, MD & CEO, OBC on the Board of Canara HSBC OBC Life Insurance Company Ltd. as Director, exempting the applicability
text: r (TO BE PUBLISHED IN PART II SECTION 3(ii) OF THE GAZETTE OF INDIA) F. No. 13/23/2013-BO.I Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Financial Services New Delhi, dated the2#February, 2018 * Phalguna8, 1939 (Saka) NOTIFICATION In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 53 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (10 of 1949), the Central Government on the recommendation of the Reserve Bank of India, hereby declare that the provisions of sub-clause (i) of clause (c) of sub-section (1) of section 10 of the said Act shall not apply to Oriental Bank of Commerce, in so far as it relates to the nomination of Shri Mukesh Kumar Jain, Managing Director & Chief Executive Officer of the Bank on the Board of Canara HSBC Oriental Bank of Commerce Life Insurance Company Limited as Director. (S. R. Mehar) Deputy Secretary to the Government of India To: The Manager Government of India Press Mayapuri Industrial Area, Ring Road New Delhi ^ttYTtOlY^ * -- 1 of 2 -- F. No. 13/23/2013-BO.I Dated, the*-5 February 2018 Copy to: 1. Shri Mukesh Kumar Jain, MD & CEO, Oriental Bank of Commerce, Head office: Gurugram 2. Chief General Manager, Department of Banking Regulation, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, Mumbai 3. PS to Finance Minister / PS to Minister of State (Revenue and Financial Services) / PS to Finance Secretary / PPS to Secretary (Financial Services) / PPS to Additional Secretary (Financial Services) 4. NIC Cell, Department of Financial Services 5. All other officers and branches in the Department of Financial Services through intranet 6. Guard File (S. R. Mehar) Deputy Secretary to the Government of India -- 2 of 2 --
